market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience unmatched urban luxury in our fully private 3-bedroom retreat. Located at the city's vibrant heart, this 4-guest space features a wellness-focused sauna for post-adventure relaxation. While the price reflects premium positioning at +312% above local median rates, we're committed to delivering exceptional value through our carefully designed city-center location. Sleeps 4 guests with all amenities included for a comfortable stay. As a new host, we're continuously refining our service to meet the needs of your city vacation, balancing world-class comfort with our central address. Limited availability: only 25% booked for the next 90 days.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space or terrace for city views
Secure parking options for extended stays
Premium toiletries suite for spa-like bathrooms
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize the city skyline view from a window as the cover photo to immediately showcase the location advantage. This perspective anchors the listing's premium positioning while justifying the premium price point.
key_diagnosis: Priced at £636.60/night (312% above cohort median of £154.60) yet only achieving 25% occupancy vs market median 47.8% - suggesting significant overpricing for target market
No specific amenities listed despite being a 4.82-rated entire home property - missing opportunity to showcase differentiators
New host with 0 years experience and undefined guest expectations - lacks trust signals needed to justify premium price
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £636.60 rate outperforms the market price by 312%, yet your 25% occupancy is only half the 47.8% median of similar properties in the area. Let's address this pricing/occupancy disconnect.
